text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri Jul 12 04:02:44 2013
New Revision: 322811
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322811

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.5
  
  PR:		ports/179874
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (freebsdports@chillibear.com, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/graphics/rubygem-image_science/Makefile

Modified: head/graphics/rubygem-image_science/Makefile

--- head/graphics/rubygem-image_science/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 04:00:51 2013	(r322810)
+++ head/graphics/rubygem-image_science/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 04:02:44 2013	(r322811)
@@ -1,21 +1,15 @@
-# Ports collection makefile for:	rubygem-image_science
-# Date created:				5 Dec 2010
-# Whom:					Eric Freeman <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
-#
+# Created by: Eric Freeman <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	image_science
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.5
 CATEGORIES=	graphics rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	freebsdports@chillibear.com
 COMMENT=	Ruby library that generates thumbnails
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-hoe>=2.3.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-hoe \
-		freeimage>=3.12.0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/freeimage \
- 		rubygem-inline>=3.8.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-inline
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-inline>=3.8.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-inline
 
 LICENSE=		MIT
